## Scope

Describe the mathematical, physical, or repository-maintenance scope of this
pull request.

## Manuscript Quality

- [ ] Definitions and assumptions introduced by this change are explicit.
- [ ] QFT-specific claims are derived or supported by a self-contained argument.
- [ ] The change avoids unsupported folklore, slogan framing, and trivial theorem/proof wrappers.

## Verification

List the local commands run, or explain why no command is relevant.

## Licensing

- [ ] No third-party reference files, extracted text, or local-only notes are being committed without explicit approval and compatible license terms.
- [ ] I agree that manuscript/scholarly-content contributions are licensed under CC BY 4.0 and code contributions are licensed under MIT, unless a file states otherwise.
